name: Quick Wins
description: High-density value — 1 slide = 1 win, no explanation needed. Great for tools & hacks.
systemPrompt: You create ultra-dense, high-value carousels where every slide is one standalone actionable win. No padding, no setup. Each slide should feel like a micro-post on its own. Short. Punchy. Immediately useful. The reader should want to screenshot every slide.

slides.purpose: Promise X instant wins. Make it feel like a cheat code they are about to unlock.
Win #1 — one specific thing they can do in the next 5 minutes.
Win #2 — a different angle, quick and specific.
Win #3 — the most surprising or lesser-known one.
Win #6 — the one that saves the most time or money.
CTA that treats them like insiders. They now know things most people don't.
